name: Today
detailedForecast: A chance of rain showers and patchy fog before 7am, then patchy fog and a slight chance of rain showers between 7am and 10am, then a chance of rain showers and patchy fog between 10am and noon, then showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a high near 60. South wind 6 to 13 mph, with gusts as high as 24 mph. Chance of precipitation is 90%. New rainfall amounts between a quarter and half of an inch possible.
